hero.subtitle: Sahbi organizes group meetups in Marrakech's best restaurants. No swiping. We meet first, we chat later.

concept.title: The Concept
concept.subtitle: The anti-swipe that puts humans first
concept.promise: No more endless virtual conversations. We meet first, we chat later.
concept.experience: Algorithm-curated groups (interests, age) gather in partner restaurants to share a meal.
concept.meaning: Sahbi means "my friend" or "my companion" in Arabic.

features.title: The Sahbi Experience
features.subtitle: Before, during and after the meetup

onboarding.title: Profile & Onboarding
onboarding.desc: Photos, bio, age, profession and interests for personalized matching.

booking.title: Intuitive booking
booking.desc: City, cuisine type, price range. Venue confirmed 24h before, participants stay secret.

unlock.title: The Unlock
unlock.desc: Presence detected (geolocation or QR). Profiles revealed after the meal.

chat.title: Group chat
chat.desc: Opens automatically after the meal to keep exchanging, share photos or plan another outing.

trust.title: Trust Score
trust.desc: 1-5 rating: punctuality, politeness, conviviality. A quality community.

waitlist.title: Marrakech Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: The first 100 sign-ups get free access to the app during the beta.
waitlist.success: Thank you! You're among the first 100. We'll contact you for the beta.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Sahbi ("we", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information.

collect.title: Data collected
items: Photos, bio, age, profession and interests

share.title: Data sharing
share.text: We never sell your data to third parties. Information shared with partner restaurants is limited to what is strictly necessary for reservation.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You can request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time. Contact us to exercise your rights.
